induced_prompt_raw: Generate a sentence with four nested relative clauses using the syntactic pattern: `[Noun 1] [Noun 2] [Noun 3] [Noun 4] [Verb A] [Verb B] [Verb C] [Verb D]`, where the verbs are resolved in reverse order (Noun 4 did Verb A to Noun 3, who did Verb B to Noun 2, who did Verb C to Noun 1, who did Verb D).
